message:
fix(tui): borrow tab label text by reference in display_width calls

Change display_width(label) to display_width(&label) in
header_mode_tabs() to match the function's expected &str signature
after tab_text() was changed to return String instead of &str.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
